sandbox_1775262977506_bd7u9ravx.name: fix-security-1775262977506
sandbox_1775262977506_bd7u9ravx.description: Automated fix for: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline

features.name: Fix: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline
features.description: The fix involves integrating security scanning tools into your Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) pipeline. This entails adding specific steps within your automated workflows to execute security analysis tools, such as Static Application Security Testing (SAST) for code and dependencies, and potentially Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) for running applications. These tools will automatically scan for vulnerabilities with every code change, providing early feedback to developers.

sandbox_1775264690321_p1o3f2zyt.name: fix-security-1775264690321
sandbox_1775264690321_p1o3f2zyt.description: Automated fix for: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline

features.name: Fix: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline
features.description: Integrate a Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tool, such as GitHub's CodeQL, into the CI/CD pipeline. This involves adding a new workflow configuration file that automatically triggers security scans on code pushes to specified branches, pull requests, and on a recurring schedule. The scanning process will analyze the codebase for potential vulnerabilities and report them, allowing developers to address security issues early in the development lifecycle before deployment.

sandbox_1775265125992_zgxl1kuky.name: fix-security-1775265125992
sandbox_1775265125992_zgxl1kuky.description: Automated fix for: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline

features.name: Fix: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline
features.description: Integrate security scanning tools into the existing CI/CD pipeline. This involves adding new stages or steps to automatically scan the codebase for vulnerabilities, insecure configurations, and known issues in third-party dependencies during the build and test phases. This can include Static Application Security Testing (SAST) for source code analysis, Software Composition Analysis (SCA) for dependency scanning, and potentially Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) for the deployed application.

sandbox_1775265441654_s17rdizt4.description: Automated fix for: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline

features.name: Fix: Consider adding security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline
features.description: The security issue highlights the absence of security scanning within the CI/CD pipeline. The fix involves integrating automated security scans directly into the CI/CD workflow to detect vulnerabilities early in the development lifecycle. This typically includes Static Application Security Testing (SAST) to analyze source code for common flaws and Software Composition Analysis (SCA) to identify known vulnerabilities in third-party dependencies.
